description: Five working hypotheses about the AI/ML field, tracked by Pulsar's calibration loop. Confidence is a 0-1 prior — calibration jobs adjust it based on observed signals.

assumptions.text: Open-source models reach within 6 months of frontier closed models on standard benchmarks.
assumptions.hypothesis: Open-source models reach within 6 months of frontier closed models on standard benchmarks.
invalidation_conditions: open-weights leader lags closed frontier by >9 months on MMLU/GPQA/SWE-bench for 2 consecutive quarters
no open release within 6 months of a flagship closed launch

assumptions.text: Agentic multi-step replaces single-shot prompting in 60%+ of production apps by EOY 2026.
assumptions.hypothesis: Agentic multi-step replaces single-shot prompting in 60%+ of production apps by EOY 2026.
invalidation_conditions: industry surveys at EOY 2026 show <40% adoption of multi-step agent flows in production

assumptions.text: Inference cost per token for equivalent capability drops at least 5x year-over-year.
assumptions.hypothesis: Inference cost per token for equivalent capability drops at least 5x year-over-year.
invalidation_conditions: frontier-equivalent token prices flat or up for 2 consecutive quarters
no new sub-quadratic / MoE / distillation release lands a >2x price cut

assumptions.text: MCP or an equivalent protocol becomes the de-facto standard for AI tool / context integration.
assumptions.hypothesis: MCP or an equivalent protocol becomes the de-facto standard for AI tool / context integration.
invalidation_conditions: 2+ major model vendors ship competing, incompatible tool protocols and refuse interop
MCP adoption stalls — fewer than 5 production integrations land in any given month for a full quarter

assumptions.text: RAG gets subsumed by long-context plus agent-driven retrieval, becoming less architecturally distinct.
assumptions.hypothesis: RAG gets subsumed by long-context plus agent-driven retrieval, becoming less architecturally distinct.
invalidation_conditions: RAG remains a primary architectural pattern in production case studies through 2026
long-context models continue to underperform retrieval pipelines on standard QA benchmarks
